title: Global CSP permits inline scripts and eval on this route
reasoning: The configured security headers apply to every route, including /:locale/learn/global-flow. Allowing both 'unsafe-inline' and 'unsafe-eval' in script-src materially weakens the CSP because any XSS introduced in this client-rendered page or shared layout can execute inline script or eval-like payloads instead of being blocked by policy.
recommendation: Remove 'unsafe-inline' and 'unsafe-eval' from the production CSP script-src. If inline bootstrapping is required, use nonces or hashes and keep any development-only relaxations gated outside production.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No tests are linked for this route, and there is no security-header assertion covering the effective CSP for the page.
suggestedRegressionTest: Add a route/header test that requests /en/learn/global-flow and asserts the Content-Security-Policy script-src does not contain 'unsafe-inline' or 'unsafe-eval' in production configuration.
